title: Takeshi's Seasons of Springtown
content: Takeshi's Seasons of Springtown archive follows the same streets, faces, and hilltop view across ten years. He photographs cherry blossoms in spring, festival lanterns in summer, river mist in autumn, and the observatory path in winter. The project is not about perfect scenery; it is about continuity. He gives prints to the people he photographs and writes the story behind each image in his notebook, preserving changes that residents might otherwise miss.
